a:T33b9,<div class="question">
<p>The graph shows the changes in lactate measured in an athlete’s blood during exercise.</p>
<p style="text-align:center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align:left;"> </p>
<p style="text-align:left;">Which hypothesis provides the most likely explanation for the curve?</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">A. As exercise intensity increases, lactate is converted back to glucose.</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">B. Anaerobic exercise results in high levels of lactate.</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">C. Lactate provides energy for intense exercise.</p>
<p style="text-align:left;">D. Under anaerobic conditions the body produces less lactate.</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.SL.TZ1.11"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","2-8-cell-respiration"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>B</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>The wording of the question was slightly awkward as none of the hypotheses offered in the answers fully explained the form of the curve on the graph. The discrimination index for the question was relatively low, probably due to some of the better candidates overthinking the issues, rather than choosing obvious answer that anaerobic exercise results in high levels of lactate.</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
